response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, craftsmanship-oriented senior engineer with genuine systems-level experience (low-latency DLang services handling millions of requests per second) and a strong teaching and mentoring streak. However, he clearly misses the role's core minimum qualification of 8 years of C++ — his documented C++ work amounts to roughly a year across National Instruments and a thesis project — and his career centers on full-stack product development (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) rather than building large-scale cloud compute infrastructure. He also lacks a formal technical-leadership role leading cloud or platform teams, making him a poor fit for this specific position despite his overall strength.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Strong mentoring and knowledge-sharing record (workshops, courses, coding dojos)
Broad, self-driven engineering range including open-source platform ownership on Kubernetes
concerns: Far short of the required 8 years of C++ (roughly 1 year of professional C/C++)
Limited large-scale cloud compute/infrastructure depth; career is mostly full-stack product work
No formal technical-lead role owning strategy, priorities, and cross-team alignment
